{{Quote|I dragged my whole family to Corbos, looking for my fortune... and all I got were dirty fingernails!|A disgruntled mine worker|<ref name="Jedi Academy: Leviathan">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Academy: Leviathan]]''</ref>}}
{{Quote|Corbos... Mining Colony! We are under attack! Some sort of... creature. Destroying our entire city! We have no weapons against-- Send help, please!|One of the Corbos miners as the [[Leviathan (creature)|leviathan]] destroys them|<ref name="Jedi Academy: Leviathan" />}}
'''Corbos Mining City''' was an experimental mine established in a crater on on [[Corbos]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. It generated electricity by using a heat exchanger in a volcanic crater, and it housed 793 miners and their families. All were killed by a [[Leviathan (creature)|Leviathan]] attack.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 1|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 1]]
